RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. DEFENDANT CHARLISA BYRD'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. $20.00 PER PAY PERIOD TO BE GARNISHED FROM DEFENDANT'S WAGES. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Laura A. Reding, CSR 711 =302/hk

Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos
Off Calendar Sep-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - CHARLISA BYRD, TEL. NO. (916) 873-9720, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Hearing On Claim Of Exemption of Charlisa Byrd is Granted. (CCP sec. 706.051(b).) $20.00 per pay period shall be withheld from Defendant's wages. Defendant has established that the rest of her income is necessary for the support of herself and her family. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Paula Shi, CSR # 13358

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF DAIMLERCHRYSLER FINANCIAL SERVICES AMERICAS LLC'S Motion For Amendment Of Judgment is granted. No opposition filed.
